options.name: <pin_or_clock_list>
options.description: List of clocks or pins for target uncertainty

options.name: -fall_from
options.description: Removes the uncertainty value only from the falling edge of the launching clocks

options.name: -fall_to
options.description: Removes the uncertainty value only from the falling edge of the capture clocks

options.name: -from
options.description: Removes the uncertainty value from both the rising and falling edges of the launching clocks

options.name: -hold
options.description: Clock uncertainty applies to hold checks

options.name: -rise_from
options.description: Removes the uncertainty value only from the rising edge of the launching clocks

options.name: -rise_to
options.description: Removes the uncertainty value only from the rising edge of the capture clocks

options.name: -setup
options.description: Clock uncertainty applies to setup checks

options.name: -to
options.description: Removes the uncertainty value from both the rising and falling edges of the capture clocks
